transcript:
**Customer:** Hello.

**AI:** Hello, this is the EY Collections department. Am I speaking with someone from Delta Pharma?

**Customer:** Yes.

**AI:** Great. I'm calling regardi-

**Customer:** Why?

**AI:** I'm calling regarding an overdue invoice. Invoice ID INV1007 for one hundred and fifty thousand rupees, which is currently two hundred and nineteen days overdue.

**Customer:** Okay.

**AI:** Could you please l-

**Customer:** What do you need from me?

**AI:** I just need to know when you expect to process the payment. Can you provide a specific date for when this will be paid?

**Customer:** Um, I have to check my account. Can you hold for 10 seconds?

**Customer:** [Waiting]

**AI:** I'm here, take your time.

**Customer:** Okay.

**Customer:** [Waiting]

**Customer:** So as we can see, the payment has been processed to the required team. I think expected date to be paid will be by this Friday.

**AI:** Thank you. Just to con-

**Customer:** ...

**AI:** Just to confirm, the promise-to-pay date is this Friday, April tenth, for the full amount of one hundred and fifty thousand rupees?

**Customer:** Yes.

**AI:** Thank you very much for your help. Have a good evening.

**Customer:** Yeah, you do.

**AI:** Goodbye.

**Customer:** Ended call
summary: Customer committed to pay Rs.150,000 by April 10, 2026
